case_title: AMANDA F. SWAIN VS. JOHN R. MONTGOMERY et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL, JURY TRIAL SET FOR JUL-06-2015 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON OCT-01-2014 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
PROOF OF SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100001328) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SWAIN, AMANDA F.

MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR JUL-06-2015 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON SEP-14-2015 AT 9:30 AM IN 206. MICHELLE LYNN MCGILL APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. JOHN R. MONTGOMERY APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT MADE AN ORAL MOTION TO CONTINUE THE TRIAL DATE AND PRESENTED PAPERS TO THE COURT. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT GRANTED A SHORT CONTINUANCE OF THE TRIAL. THE TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED TO 9/14/15 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. THE COURT LEVIED SANCTIONS AGAINST JOHN R. MONTGOMERY TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL, MICHELLE LYNN MCGILL, AS COSTS FOR TODAY'S TRIAL PREPARATION. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL REQUESTED FOR COSTS AT 20 HOURS AT $400.00 PER HOUR. AFTER DEFENDANT'S OBJECTION, THE COURT ORDERED SANCTIONS FOR 15 HOURS PAYABLE TO ATTORNEY MCGILL WITHIN 30 DAYS. JUDGE: JOHN K. STEWART; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, CROSS COMPLAINANT JOHN MONTGOMERY'S MOTION TO STAY ACTION AND COMPEL ARBITRATION IS DENIED. MOVING PARTY DELAYED FOR LONG PERIOD OF TIME (OVER ONE YEAR) BEFORE SEEKING A STAY AND ARBITRATION. MOVING PARTY FAILS TO PROVIDE ANY EVIDENCE THAT ARBITRATION WAS REQUESTED AFTER MEDIATION FAILED. ADDITIONALLY, PROPOSED FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS NOT THE OPERATIVE COMPLAINT IN THIS ACTION. THE OPERATIVE COMPLAINT IS NOT BASED ON THE BREACH OF THE CONTRACT CONTAINING AN ARBITRATION PROVISION. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR A STATMENT OF DECISION IS DENIED. ORDERED SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay Action And Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Sep-04-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
Rene Gamboa, Esq., (415-362-2580) of Lewis, Brisbois, Bisgard & Smith for Plaintiff/Opposing party Amanda F. Swain.
John R. Montgomery (415-292-6333) Defendant/Moving party appearing on his own behalf.

Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral arguments adopts the tentative ruling as follows: CROSS COMPLAINANT JOHN MONTGOMERY's Motion To Stay Action And Compel Arbitration is DENIED. Moving party delayed for long period of time (over one year) before seeking a stay and arbitration. Moving party fails to provide any evidence that arbitration was requested after mediation failed. Additionally, proposed First Amended Complaint is not the operative complaint in this action. The operative complaint is not based on the breach of the contract containing an arbitration provision. Defendant's request for a statment of decision is Denied. Ordered signed in open court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay; Clerk: J. Murphy; Not Reported. (501)
